---
title: 'Ros report for input file `r relative_input_file`'
subtitle: "`r paste0('Last updated: ', format(Sys.time(), format = '%d %B %Y - %H:%M'))`" #%F %r %Z
author: "Author: [IOTC Secretariat](mailto:IOTC-Secretariat@fao.org)"
output:
  html_document:
    mathjax: null
    css: "../templates/html_template.css"
    number_sections: FALSE
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: FALSE
    smooth_scroll: FALSE
---
```{r, setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 8, echo = FALSE)
```

```{r detail, child='report-abstract.Rmd'}
```

# Summary {.tabset}
```{r }
options(DT.options = list(pageLength = -1))
```
```{r summary, child='report-PS-summary.Rmd'}
```

# Details {.tabset}

```{r }
options(DT.options = list(pageLength = PAGE_LENGTH))
```
```{r echo = FALSE }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"O-INFO")
```
```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"V-INFO")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"V-TRIP")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"V-ATTRIBUTES")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"G-GENERAL")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"G-CONFIG-BRANCHLINES")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"E-SET")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"E-SET-CETACEANS")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"E-SET-CATCHES")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"E-SET-CATCHES-SPECIMEN")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"E-SET-CATCHES-SPECIMEN-SSI")
```

```{r }
out_dt_detail(check_data,"A-SURFACE")
```

```{r results = "asis"}
if (length(check_data) == 0) {
  cat("No message :)")
}
```
